notes: GaN on SiC (0.25um), Psat >47 dBm (~50W), PAE >44%, gain >20 dB, 6x6mm plastic overmold QFN. Active.
DISCONTINUED. GaN on SiC (QGaN25), >60W Psat, >21 dB gain, PAE >43%, 50-ohm matched. D = die variant. Non-D variant QPA2308 may be active.
GaN C-band packaged MMIC, 50 dBm Psat (100W), gain 22 dB, PAE 52%, VD=50V, 7x7x0.82mm QFN. Active.
GaN C-band packaged MMIC, 47 dBm Psat (50W), gain 23 dB, PAE 53%, VD=50V, 7x7x0.82mm QFN. Active. Lower quiescent current vs QPA2309.
GaN on SiC plastic overmold QFN, >10W Psat (>40 dBm), gain 19 dB, PAE >39%, 22V supply. Active. Note: QPA1019D (die variant) is discontinued; base packaged part active.
BARE DIE variant of QPA1019. 'D' suffix = die form factor. Excluded from packaged IC list — use QPA1019 (packaged) instead.
GaN on SiC (QGaN25), 4W Psat, 53% PAE, 18 dB gain, 4x4mm plastic QFN, 50-ohm matched. Near miss: ~1 dB short of 5W threshold.
DISCONTINUED. 40W Psat, 29 dB gain, >36% PAE, CuW flanged package. Suggested replacements available from RFMW.
EXCLUDED: Wi-Fi 6E FEM (PA+SP2T+LNA), ~200mW output. Not a power amplifier IC. Discontinued.
Discontinued (PCN 24-0121, LTB April 2025). 5G Massive MIMO Doherty PA module, frequency only to 5.0 GHz. Freq near miss.
Very narrow band 4.5-4.6 GHz only. 5W RMS. Does not cover 5-6 GHz. Not a near miss for freq.
GaAs MMIC 2-stage C-band PA in 5mm 20-lead PQFN. 37% PAE. Announced 2013, still listed on MACOM site. Freq range misses 5.0-5.2 GHz lower edge. Near miss on frequency.
GaN on SiC MMIC HPA, 0.15um, 5x5mm plastic QFN. 10W Psat, 12dB gain, 40% PAE. Active at Mouser and DigiKey. Wideband covers 5-6 GHz.
Originally Wolfspeed product, now MACOM (acquired Wolfspeed RF business Dec 2023). GaN on SiC, 5x5mm QFN. Rated 80W min Psat, 110W typical at 40V. 29dB gain, >48% PAE. AESA pulsed radar.
GaN HEMT MMIC two-stage reactively matched, 28V. 25W Psat, 25dB gain, >30% PAE, fully 50-ohm matched. Active. Also available in flange variant (F suffix).
GaN on Si HEMT, DC-6 GHz, 4W, 11dB gain, 28V, 24-VFQFN. Near miss: under 5W threshold.
GaN on Si, 1-5 GHz, 2W. Neither power nor freq requirements met. Excluded.
Originally Wolfspeed, now MACOM (Dec 2023 acquisition). GaN on SiC, 5x5mm QFN. 50W typ Psat (65W), >50% PAE, 27dB gain, 28V. Two-stage reactively matched. C-band phased array radar.

Originally Wolfspeed, now MACOM. GaN MMIC in flange package (type 440219). F suffix = flange. 28V supply. Internally matched. Active. Lower power sibling to CMPA5259050S. Note: freq range 5.2-5.9, agent confirmed covers_5_to_6_ghz=true based on datasheet.

Originally Wolfspeed/Cree, now MACOM. Unmatched broadband GaN HEMT, 28V. 10W rated, 13W typical Psat. Flange (CGH40010F) and pill (CGH40010P) package variants. NRND per DigiKey. Requires external matching for 5-6 GHz.
Originally Wolfspeed/Cree, now MACOM. Unmatched broadband GaN HEMT, 25W class, 30W typical Psat. Flange package. 28V. NRND per DigiKey. Requires external matching.
GaN MMIC broadband PA. 10-lead LDCC ceramic package (HMC8205BF10); bare die also available (HMC8205BCHIPS). No external matching. 38% PAE. Active.
GaN broadband PA, 14-lead nonhermetic LDCC ceramic. Headline 2-6 GHz but guaranteed spec range is 2.3-5.7 GHz (misses 5.7-5.8+ GHz). 39% PAE, 28V. Near miss on upper frequency edge.
EXCLUDED - COMPLETE MODULE: 18-lead hermetically sealed module with internal 50-ohm matching, RF connectors. NOT a bare packaged IC. Cannot be used as a chip for board-level integration.
EXCLUDED - RACK MOUNT SYSTEM: 5U 19-inch rack-mount chassis with self-contained power supply. NOT an IC.
EXCLUDED - LNA: GaAs pHEMT Low Noise Amplifier, NOT a power amplifier. P1dB=16 dBm (40mW). 3x3mm QFN.
GaAs pHEMT MMIC 3-stage medium power amplifier. 24-lead 5x5mm QFN. Psat=35 dBm (~3.16W), 29 dB gain, 34% PAE, 8V supply. Near miss: under 5W. Freq range starts at 5.5 GHz (misses 5.0-5.5).
Two-stage GaN MMIC HPA in QFN package. 12W, 40% PAE. Rated band starts at 5.6 GHz, misses 5.0-5.6 GHz. Near miss on freq lower edge.
GaN PA module, 3.16W Psat (35 dBm), >50% PAE. Freq starts at 5.2 GHz. Near miss on both freq (misses 5.0-5.2) and power (under 5W).
High-freq Power-LNA/linear driver. P1dB ~26 dBm (~0.4W). Far below 5W. Not a final-stage PA. Excluded.
GaN MMIC multi-stage PA in 4x5mm QFN. >5W over 3.0-5.5 GHz. Upper freq 5.5 GHz does not cover 5.5-5.8 GHz. Near miss on upper freq edge.
Fully-matched GaN-on-SiC 50-ohm RF power transistor for C-band CW. 50W, metal ceramic package. Freq range 5.2-5.9 GHz, misses 5.0-5.2 GHz lower edge. Near miss on freq.
Fully-matched GaN-on-SiC 50-ohm RF power transistor for C-band CW. 25W min, 12 dB gain, 48% efficiency, 36V. Freq range 5.2-5.9 GHz, misses 5.0-5.2 GHz. Near miss on freq.
EXCLUDED - COMPLETE MODULE PALLET: CW amplifier pallet with connectors, not a bare MMIC chip. Freq range also only covers 5.725-5.85 GHz.
